title: Are they hiding under our oceans?
summary: This interview discusses the theory that UAP/UFOs may be hiding in Earth's oceans, with claims that there is more underwater UFO activity than aerial activity. Multiple witness accounts of objects entering the ocean are referenced.

acronyms.definition: An aerial phenomenon that cannot be immediately identified

key_claims.claim: Multiple witnesses reported seeing a large blue object fall out of the sky and into the ocean
An unknown sphere followed a Navy warship before disappearing into the ocean
There is more UFO activity under the water than there is in the air
The ocean is the least explored spot on the planet and would be an ideal hiding place
